name: I'm on a long staircase
hints: On the staircase between the rocky strand and the temple. Flint and steel are here for making fire.
GET FLINT - useful for lighting torches or fires. STEP UP to continue toward the temple, STEP DOWN to return to the shore.
STEP UP to reach the sacred temple. STEP DOWN to return to the rocky strand. If an animated statue blocks your way, PUSH STATUE to topple it down the stairs.

effects: Message: Statue topples down the stairs

notes: The long staircase between the rocky strand (room 19) and the sacred temple (room 21). Contains flint and steel for fire-making. Use STEP UP/STEP DOWN (not GO STAIRCASE). An animated statue may appear here as an obstacle - PUSH STATUE to topple it down the stairs.
